name: Monday.com
shortDescription: Work management platform integration for automating boards, items, groups, and workspaces through Monday.com's GraphQL API. Manage project tasks, update column values, post comments, and monitor boards for changes with polling triggers.

actions.name: Create Item
actions.description: Create a new item on a Monday.com board within a specified group, with optional column values.

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Monday.com item, including its column values, group, and board.

actions.name: List Items
actions.description: List and search items on a Monday.com board. Optionally filter by column values, and page through large boards with a cursor. Use this to find items matching criteria (e.g. every item whose Status is "Done") rather than fetching one item you already know the ID of.

actions.name: Update Item Name
actions.description: Update the name of a specific item on a Monday.com board.

actions.name: Change Column Value
actions.description: Change the value of a specific column for an item on a Monday.com board.

actions.name: Change Multiple Column Values
actions.description: Change multiple column values at once for an item on a Monday.com board.

actions.name: Add File to Column
actions.description: Upload a file from Flowrunner file storage into a Files column on a Monday.com item. Use this to attach a generated document, export, or image to an item.

actions.name: Move Item to Group
actions.description: Move an item to a different group within the same Monday.com board.

actions.name: Move Item to Board
actions.description: Move an item (and any subitems) from its current board to a different Monday.com board and group. Columns are matched by name and type automatically, or map them explicitly.

actions.name: Archive Item
actions.description: Archive an item on Monday.com, removing it from the active board view while preserving its data.

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Permanently delete an item from a Monday.com board. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Subitem
actions.description: Create a new subitem under an existing Monday.com item, with optional column values.

actions.name: Delete Subitem
actions.description: Permanently delete a subitem from Monday.com. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Update
actions.description: Post an update (comment) on a Monday.com item. Supports HTML formatting for rich text content.

actions.name: Delete Update
actions.description: Permanently delete an update (comment) from Monday.com. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Board
actions.description: Create a new board in Monday.com with a specified visibility level and optional workspace assignment.

actions.name: Duplicate Board
actions.description: Duplicate an existing Monday.com board with options to include structure only, items, or items with updates.

actions.name: Get Board
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Monday.com board, including its columns, groups, and owners.

actions.name: Delete Board
actions.description: Permanently delete a Monday.com board and all of its data. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Group
actions.description: Create a new group on a Monday.com board to organize items.

actions.name: Delete Group
actions.description: Permanently delete a group and all its items from a Monday.com board. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Duplicate Group
actions.description: Duplicate a group within a Monday.com board, including all of its items and column values.

actions.name: Create Workspace
actions.description: Create a new workspace in Monday.com with a specified visibility level and optional description.

actions.name: Create Column
actions.description: Create a new column on a Monday.com board with the specified type and title.

idealUseCases: Automating task creation and status updates across project boards
Syncing item data between Monday.com and external systems like CRMs or spreadsheets
Monitoring boards for new items or column changes to trigger downstream workflows
Organizing projects by programmatically creating boards, groups, and workspaces
Posting updates and comments on items from external events or notifications
Bulk-updating column values across items based on business logic
agentIdeas: When a **Monday.com** "On New Item" trigger fires, use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to notify the team about the new task with board and group details
Use **Google Sheets** "On New Row" trigger to capture form submissions, then call **Monday.com** "Create Item" to add each entry as a task on the appropriate board with column values pre-filled
When a **Monday.com** "On Item Column Change" trigger detects a status change to "Done", use **Gmail** "Send Message" to notify the client that their request has been completed
